title: cracca frutescens
intro: Cracca frutescens, also known as Laburnum alpinum or alpine laburnum, is a flowering plant species within the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, and it has also been used to treat skin conditions and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Cracca frutescens, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
